Who We Are

Cold Precision.
Built to Last.

Trusted cooling system manufacturer since 1997 — delivering complete cold chain solutions for food, pharma, dairy, and industry for 28 years.

28
yrs exp

With 28 years of expertise since 1997, we design and manufacture cold storage systems tailored to your exact requirements — from compact pharma chambers to large-scale agricultural storage plants. Over 2000 successful installations across India.

🏭
Direct Factory Manufacturer
Custom PUF & GI panel fabrication — no middlemen, factory-direct pricing.
🌡️
Precision Temperature Control
Systems maintain –5°C to +30°C with automated digital controls.
🔧
24/7 AMC & Service
Annual Maintenance Contracts with round-the-clock emergency response.

Industries We Serve

Walk-in freezers for fisheries, processing & seafood exports

Cold storage for onions, potatoes, grapes & vegetables
💊
Pharmaceutical
WHO-GMP chambers for medicines, vaccines & biotech
🥩

Hygiene cold rooms for slaughterhouses & meat processing
🍎
Horticulture
Controlled atmosphere for mango, banana & grapes
🧁
Bakery & Dairy
Precision chillers for ice cream units & dairy production
🏭
Industrial
Process cooling, CNC chillers & water cooling systems
🏥
Hospital
Blood bank refrigerators, morgue & pharma cold rooms
Why Choose Us

Cold Chain Done Right

01
Custom Engineering, Every Time
Each system engineered to your exact dimensions, temperature & capacity. No off-the-shelf compromises.
02
Energy Efficient Design
High-density PUF panels (100–200mm) + inverter compressors keep power bills low year-round.
03
Installation in 25–30 Days
Pre-fabricated PUF panels, quick-connect fittings & full commissioning in 25–30 days.
04
Pan-Maharashtra Service
Field teams in Sangli, Kolhapur, Pune, Nashik with 24hr emergency response.
